description_long: This helmet is a stylized, classical design reminiscent of ancient Greek or Roman warrior helmets, featuring a prominent crest running from front to back along the top. The helmet is predominantly black with metallic gold trim accentuating the crest and the edges, giving it a striking and regal appearance. The face opening is angular, with cheek guards extending downward and a pointed section at the nose, providing both protection and visibility. The sides of the helmet are smooth and rounded, with no visible ventilation or additional attachments. The surface appears hard and slightly glossy, suggesting a metal or high-quality composite material. There are no visible logos, graphics, or modern features such as visors or retention systems.
description: A black and gold classical warrior helmet with a prominent crest and angular face opening, featuring smooth, glossy surfaces and no visible modern attachments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular face opening, pointed nose guard, and the central crest running from front to back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth, rounded profile, the full length of the crest, and the extended cheek guard.
description_view_2: Top view displays the dual gold-trimmed crest lines and the helmet's symmetrical, elongated shape.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the rounded side, crest, and cheek guard.
